symbols: throne — royal authority and the power of the conqueror over the vanquished
pointing gesture — command, judgment, or decree issued by a ruler
kneeling/bowed figure — supplication and the vulnerability of the defeated
description: A pencil and graphite drawing depicting a classical interior with columns and a large throne at center. A standing male figure at left, dressed in classical military attire, extends his arm in a commanding gesture toward a seated male figure enthroned at center. At the foot of the throne, a figure crouches or kneels. To the right, a female figure in flowing robes turns away or recoils, her posture conveying distress. The scene is rendered in fine, delicate lines with subtle shading.
